text: I am surrounded by bright, clean architecture and the promise of innovation. There is a sense of anticipation as I move into the R+D space. Inspiration hovers here; words on the wall invite me to reflect on the uncertainties and possibilities bound up in research and development. The combination of technology, color, and thoughtful text makes me feel quietly optimistic. I’m aware of my own smallness within this carefully designed tableau, but also of my connection to the ideas celebrated in this place.
